name: audience
description: Who the learner is (children / secondary / undergrad / general public / professional) and the one evidence-based methodology to hand them the concept — CRA, 5E, Peer Instruction, Mayer, Merrill — plus layout defaults. Skill-only. A default pack: auto-installed at `faraday new`.

skill.loadWhen: you are pinning who the learner is and choosing how to hand them the concept (audience is a gate in Discover)
